name: Murph (2015 Games)
description: The classic Murph Hero WOD — a mile run bookending 100 pull-ups, 200 push-ups, and 300 air squats — run as a Games event under a 55-minute cap.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2015/3 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; the Hero WOD Murph with 20 lb (men) / 14 lb (women) body armor and a 55-minute cap; athletes advance to the next bar/rig every 25 pull-ups, 50 push-ups, and 75 squats
